$comment: Category overrides for endpoints. Heuristic order: override > pre-login (auth=null + login-ish path) > admin > my-team-space > dashboard > uncategorized. Override key = '<serviceId>:<METHOD>:<path>'. Value: 'pre-login' | 'dashboard' | 'admin' | 'my-team-space' | 'none'.

categoryDescriptions.pre-login: Authentication and onboarding endpoints reachable without an active session — login, registration, OTP, token refresh, password reset.
categoryDescriptions.dashboard: Endpoints consumed by learner-facing post-login screens: home, dashboards, course lists, training records, exams, the reader.
categoryDescriptions.admin: Endpoints consumed by administrative screens — user/role/institution management, configuration, exports, bulk operations.
categoryDescriptions.my-team-space: Endpoints used by team-management screens — privileging, competency reportees, my-team views.
categoryDescriptions.uncategorized: Endpoints with no matching UI consumer or category signal yet. Tighten heuristics in tools/categories.json or add an override.
